name: California Coastal Zone Requirements
description: Additional requirements for properties within the Coastal Zone boundary

additional_clearances.description: Coastal Development Permit from City Planning
additional_clearances.notes: May require California Coastal Commission review if appealed

restrictions: Structures must comply with Coastal Act height and bulk limitations
Environmentally Sensitive Habitat Area (ESHA) setbacks required
exemptions_for_fire_rebuild: Categorical exclusion may apply for like-for-like rebuild under EO1
Expedited review timeline for fire victims
